THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. PURSUANT TO THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT MATTER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-30-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APTUS COURT REPORTING LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RONALD HARRISON, DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SMITH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANNING & KASS, ELLROD, RAMIREZ TRESTER LLP IS PRESENT MICHAEL SMITH, OWNER. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING. PARTIES MUST APPEAR AT THE JAN-30-2019 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE NEXT HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
